channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'It's gonna be awesome': Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff has high hopes for using AI in its products, says 'it's impossible to describe what we're gonna be able to do for customers'
item.description: "Everything's gonna be cheaper to make, it's more efficient", says Salesforce CEO.
